scripts.build: echo 'Compiling lib-slow-24 (large package)...' && sleep 3.3 && echo 'Bundling...' && sleep 0.5 && echo 'Minifying...' && sleep 0.3 && echo 'lib-slow-24 done!' && mkdir -p dist && date > dist/.stamp
scripts.dev: echo 'lib-slow-24 dev mode' && while true; do sleep 3; echo '[lib-slow-24] compiled successfully'; done
scripts.lint: echo 'Checking lib-slow-24...' && sleep 0.3 && echo 'TypeScript: OK' && echo 'ESLint: OK'
scripts.test: echo 'Test suite: lib-slow-24' && sleep .9 && echo '  PASS src/index.test.ts (8 tests)' && echo '  PASS src/utils.test.ts (12 tests)'
